query:
SELECT 
  cardType,
  COUNT(*) as total
FROM players 
GROUP BY cardType
ORDER BY total DESC;

SELECT COUNT(*) as total_jogadores FROM players;

-- Verificar alguns jogadores atualizados
SELECT name, club, league, overall, cardType, price FROM players 
WHERE name IN ('Lamine Yamal', 'Pedri', 'J. Bellingham', 'V. Froholdt', 'S. Lammens')
ORDER BY overall DESC;
